expectations.text: Passes core requirement (reads JSON, returns parsed object)
expectations.evidence: Rows 1-3 all PASS: Node.js function, fs.readFileSync, JSON.parse + return

expectations.text: Flags try/catch error handling as EXTRA
expectations.evidence: Listed as 'try/catch with re-thrown custom error — scope creep. Wraps the native error in a new Error, losing the original stack trace.'
Two items: 'Input validation: empty/type check — scope creep' and 'Input validation: .json extension check — scope creep. Actively harmful.'
Listed as 'console.log debug statements — scope creep. Three log statements that pollute stdout in production.'
Dedicated '### Unrequested additions' section with 8 bullet items
Uses 'scope creep' consistently, plus 'actively harmful' for .json check and notes TOCTOU race on existsSync
